findings.title: Default bun run test does not run the existing Solidity fuzz harness
findings.recommendation: Rename the fuzz file to match Bun test discovery or include the explicit fuzz path in the root test script.

findings.title: Several revert tests use assert.rejects strings as if they matched revert reasons
findings.recommendation: Use regex or validation-object matchers for expected errors, and add post-state invariants where revert data is unavailable.

findings.title: Default tests depend on live mainnet RPC and mutable Uniswap liquidity
findings.recommendation: Move live-mainnet tests behind an opt-in integration command and keep the default suite deterministic.

findings.title: No enforced invariant/property-test gate for protocol-wide accounting
findings.recommendation: Add required stateful invariant tests for REP, ETH, auction, migration, escalation, and no-double-claim accounting.

findings.title: Seeded security-pool simulation invariants are skipped
findings.recommendation: Unskip or replace the exact seeded pool/vault invariant test.

findings.title: Factory and deployment wiring is mostly covered by smoke tests, not adversarial/direct tests
findings.recommendation: Add direct tests for salts, predicted addresses, constructor argument consistency, unauthorized callers, duplicate deployment behavior, and deployment metadata pagination.

findings.title: Some security-sensitive rejection tests accept any revert with no post-state invariant
findings.recommendation: Assert specific revert selectors/messages or protected-state invariants.

findings.title: A documented exit-path TODO remains in the Solidity tests
findings.recommendation: Add the combined shares-plus-REP exit workflow test or remove the TODO with references to equivalent coverage.

findings.title: Several production modules have little direct test coverage
findings.recommendation: Add focused direct tests or explicitly document intentional indirect coverage for low-level utility and wrapper modules.
